productDisplayName: Puma Men's Basket White Green Shoe
description: First launched in 1971, the Basketball Classic in an all-time retro style that will never go out of fashion. The leather upper offers great comfort and durability, while the rubber outsole provides absolute grip.UpperLeather upper for great style with suede formstripeUpper stitched to the outsole for added durabilityCentral lacing system for snug, customised FitLightly padded collar for snug fitPerforation on the medial side for breathabilityMidsoleLightly padded insole for added comfort.EVA midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTextured rubber outsole for durability and absolute grip and traction on various surfaces
